title: The bakery short list: Salt Lake Valley + Park City, Heber & Midway
scope: Salt Lake Valley and the Wasatch Back corridor of Park City, Heber City, and Midway, with an East Millcreek home base.

practical.name: Mims Bakery
practical.summary: Cottage microbakery with naturally leavened bread and seasonal Wheeler Farm market access.

practical.name: Amsterdam Delicious
practical.summary: Handmade small-batch Dutch stroopwafel and cookies; arrange ordering and pickup first.

practical.name: Sheer Ambrosia Bakery
practical.address: 1749 S State St #102, Salt Lake City
practical.summary: Polished 45-layer baklava in rotating flavors; a strong showpiece or gift.

practical.name: Nano's Bagels
practical.summary: Bagel specialist: hand-rolled, boiled, and baked daily.

practical.name: Auntie Em's
practical.summary: Park City preorder pie and bread producer; arrange in advance.

practical.name: The Bake Shop
practical.summary: Exploratory breakfast stop with laminated pastry and bread.

practical.name: Hawk & Sparrow
practical.summary: Hand-formed, multi-day naturally leavened loaves with some on-site milling; verify Saturday hours.

practical.name: Red Bicycle Breadworks
practical.address: Stockist at 1500 Snow Creek Dr, Park City
practical.summary: High-scratch wholesale bread; verify current retail stock rather than navigating to production.

practical.name: Süss Cookie Company
practical.summary: rated survivor — C — worthwhile specialist

practical.name: Midway Bakery on Main
practical.summary: Broad Midway bakery and dependable town-center stop.

practical.name: Luna's Kitchen & Juicery
practical.address: 1400 Snow Creek Dr L, Park City
practical.summary: Dedicated gluten-free kitchen and pastry destination in Park City.

practical.name: Pie Party
practical.address: 3130 S Highland Dr A4, Salt Lake City
practical.summary: Seasonal scratch pie specialist; inventory depends on the current preorder or market schedule.

practical.name: JD Flannel Donuts & Coffee — Foothill Village
practical.address: 1400 S Foothill Dr #112, Salt Lake City
practical.summary: Handmade small-batch scratch doughnuts at Foothill Village.

practical.name: Argentina's Café — Salt Lake County branch
practical.summary: rated survivor — B; exact current Google place card 4.5 (n=336), user-verified 2026-07-16

practical.name: Beardall's Bakery
practical.summary: Broad local Magna bakery and practical neighborhood standby.

practical.name: Ballerina Farm Store — Midway
practical.summary: Farm-store bread and pastry; rating covers the wider store experience.

practical.name: The Bakery at Zermatt Utah
practical.summary: Resort bakery with a made-from-scratch claim; branch execution remains less certain.

practical.name: The Flour Box Bakery LLC
practical.summary: Home/preorder bakery producing scratch sourdough, pies, and laminated pastry.

practical.name: All Purpose Bakehouse
practical.summary: Three-day croissants and pain suisse with overnight fermentation and butter lamination; go early.

practical.name: Auntie Rae's Sweets & Tea Parties
practical.summary: Tea-party and classic-dessert specialist with broad public access.

practical.name: Beaucoup Boulangerie et Marche
practical.summary: rated survivor — B — strong regional

practical.name: Carol's Pastry Shop
practical.summary: Traditional pastry-shop standby.

practical.name: Chez Nibs
practical.summary: Chocolate-led pâtisserie with laminated pastry, including kouign-amann.

practical.name: City Cakes
practical.summary: rated survivor — D; exact Midvale branch direct Google record 4.4

practical.name: Donut Boy
practical.summary: West Valley neighborhood doughnut stop.

practical.name: Donut House
practical.summary: Neighborhood morning doughnut stop.

practical.name: Dough Lady
practical.summary: Rotation-driven home bakery known for cinnamon rolls; ordering is not walk-in.

practical.name: Dough Miner
practical.summary: Bagels, pasties, rolls, custards, and glazes made in house; weekly specials and early sell-outs.

practical.name: Eclair French Pastry
practical.summary: Focused éclair and French pastry shop with deep flavor exploration.

practical.name: Eva's Bakery
practical.address: 155 S Main St, Salt Lake City
practical.summary: Downtown French-style classic with bread and laminated pastry.

practical.name: Fillings & Emulsions
practical.summary: Broad pâtisserie and laminated-pastry destination with strong variety.

practical.name: Forty Three Bakery
practical.summary: West-side bakery destination covering bread and lamination.

practical.name: Fresh Donut & Deli
practical.address: 2699 S State St, South Salt Lake
practical.summary: Classic scratch morning doughnut stop with a large rating base.

practical.name: Fudge Co
practical.summary: Scratch confectionery specialist for gifts and focused sweets.

practical.name: Good Food Gluten Free
practical.address: 423 W 800 S A113, Salt Lake City
practical.summary: Gluten-free-specific bakery standby.

practical.name: Great Harvest Bread Company
practical.summary: Branch with daily stone milling and reliable traditional bread; lower novelty.

practical.name: Great Harvest Bread Company
practical.summary: Draper branch with daily stone milling and no mixes or frozen dough.

practical.name: June Pie
practical.summary: Seasonal hand-pie specialist; check the current ordering window.

practical.name: Leavity Bread & Coffee
practical.address: 1000 S Main St #101, Salt Lake City
practical.summary: Long-fermented naturally leavened bread with a dependable public café counter.

practical.name: Middle Eastern Bakery & Groceries
practical.summary: Fresh Middle Eastern flatbread reportedly made multiple times a day; verify conflicting hours.

practical.name: Momo's Gourmet Cheesecake
practical.summary: Cheesecake specialist with weekly flavor interest and a downtown storefront.

practical.name: Mozz Sourdough Pizza
practical.summary: Naturally leavened pizza for a sourdough-specific occasion.

practical.name: Mrs. Hewitt's
practical.summary: Gluten-free wholesale bread; verify current retail stockist.

practical.name: Parfé Diem
practical.summary: rated survivor — D — qualified standby

practical.name: RubySnap Fresh Cookies
practical.summary: Each cookie gets its own built dough, with scratch components such as lime curd and rotating specials.

practical.name: Sagato's Bakery and Cafe
practical.summary: Pacific meat pies, kekepua'a, sausage rolls, lamingtons, and regional desserts.

practical.name: Sidecar Doughnuts & Coffee
practical.summary: Scratch doughnuts produced throughout the day; developing local rating evidence.

practical.name: Stone Ground Bakery
practical.summary: High-scratch wholesale bread with comparatively low novelty; verify retail availability.

practical.name: Table X Bread
practical.summary: Handmade daily bread with levain and a documented 36-hour fermentation process.

practical.name: Tulie Bakery
practical.summary: Deep pastry case with croissants, cakes, tarts, quiche, cookies, and scratch components.

practical.name: Vosen's Bread Paradise
practical.summary: Traditional German bread and pastry shop with a dependable downtown counter.

practical.name: eats
practical.summary: Broad downtown bakery-and-coffee standby with documented homemade products.

practical.name: Bohemian Baklava
practical.summary: Small-batch baklava with house syrup, pistachio cream, tahini, and rotating uncommon flavors.

practical.name: Empanada.Co
practical.summary: Continuously baked small-batch empanadas with a live menu; verify same day because status labels conflict.

practical.name: Feldman's Deli
practical.address: 2005 E 2700 S Ste D, Salt Lake City
practical.summary: Hand-rolled, boiled-and-baked Jewish-deli bagels in a limited daily batch; go early. Direct Google count is unavailable.

practical.name: Baby's Bagels
practical.address: 204 East 500 South, Salt Lake City, UT 84111
practical.summary: Scratch bagels are confirmed by user ground truth; the run also found in-house cured lox and sauces. Rating and most rubric criteria remain unknown.

practical.name: Bagel Den
practical.address: 570 North Main Street, Heber City, UT 84032
practical.summary: The official site confirms scratch-made schmears but says the bagel dough arrives from New York. The partial score covers schmears only; the aggregate rating remains unavailable.

practical.name: ValSof Bakery
practical.summary: Low-confidence evidence supports house fillings only. Dough, bread, puff pastry, and lamination remain unknown; Restaurantji reported 4.4/5 from 141 ratings.

audit.summary: Strong natural-leavening and hand-shaped bagel process; no attributable current aggregate rating.

audit.name: Tomodachi Bake Shoppe
